title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS company backed by $85M+ in funding, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ year requirement, deep RevOps/GTM expertise aligns perfectly with Head of Revenue Operations role, B2B SaaS and Fintech background directly relevant to cloud cost management space, and Tel Aviv location is ideal.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and your profile immediately stood out as a potential exceptional fit. With 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS RevOps through high-growth phases and deep Salesforce expertise, you've likely built exactly the kind of operational backbone Finout needs as it scales from its $85M+ funding base. The Tel Aviv HQ collaboration aligns perfectly with your location flexibility—would be worth a 15-minute conversation to explore how your GTM engine building experience could accelerate their next growth phase.

title: GTM Engineer, Revenue Operations
description: Remote seeks a GTM Engineer to design and maintain a robust GTM tech stack that streamlines outbound prospecting and minimizes manual effort. The role involves implementing automated workflows, building reporting and ROI analyses, ensuring data integrity, and creating Ideal Customer Profiles. Requires extensive experience in a revenue operations or systems role, ideally in B2B SaaS. Reports to the Director of Revenue Systems & Processes, with the flexibility of asynchronous, fully remote work.
score_reason: Exceptional alignment with Omri's core RevOps expertise in GTM tech stack design, workflow automation, data integrity, and pipeline analytics. Remote global role with B2B SaaS focus directly matches his 15+ years of experience and location preferences.
ai_opener: I've spent 15+ years building and optimizing GTM tech stacks for B2B SaaS companies, and your GTM Engineer role caught my attention—particularly the focus on automating outbound prospecting and creating data-driven ROI frameworks. I've led similar initiatives implementing workflow automation, building forecasting models, and ensuring data integrity across Salesforce and HubSpot environments, and I'd love to discuss how I can bring that foundation to your revenue systems.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Tempo is hiring a GTM Engineer to build out GTM systems in an AI-first way. The role involves building autonomous AI systems that research prospects, craft personalized messages, and manage follow-up sequences at scale, plus developing lead scoring and enrichment pipelines. Requires 5+ years in data, software engineering, or RevOps roles in B2B SaaS, complex workflow design, API integrations, prompt engineering, and RAG/vector database experience using tools like Supabase or Pinecone.

However, the role's heavy emphasis on software engineering, prompt engineering, and vector database experience (Pinecone/Supabase) suggests this skews more technical/IC than typical RevOps leadership roles—Omri's strength is in operational strategy and systems design rather than hands-on ML engineering.
ai_opener: I've spent 15+ years building GTM systems at scale in B2B SaaS—from pipeline forecasting to autonomous lead workflows. Tempo's vision of AI-first GTM systems resonates deeply with my philosophy. While my expertise is more RevOps/strategy-focused than deep software engineering, I'm very interested in how you're architecting these autonomous research and personalization pipelines—this feels like the natural evolution of what I've been building operationally.

title: GTM Engineer

The role focuses on designing and building automation across the GTM stack (HubSpot, BigQuery, Hightouch, enrichment tools), extending PLS trigger infrastructure, and translating product usage signals into actionable workflows. Requires 3+ years in GTM Engineering, Sales Engineering, or RevOps Engineering at a B2B SaaS company, with HubSpot APIs, SQL/BigQuery, and Python/Node.js automation skills. Fully remote with ESOP.

The role's focus on automation infrastructure, data pipelines, and GTM stack integration directly matches his core competencies, though it skews slightly more technical/engineering-focused than typical RevOps manager positions.

The intersection of product usage signals and actionable GTM workflows is where I've driven the most significant revenue impact, and I'm curious how Supabase is approaching PLS trigger design across your open-source and commercial motions.

title: GTM Engineer
